About

Somewhere between clarity and mystery.

I'm KDP — a wanderer in the digital and the real. This space is where I put words to the things I can't stop thinking about: ideas that won't sit still, art that demands attention, and code that shapes the unseen.

No single lane. No fixed destination. Just honest exploration of music, philosophy, tech, and everything unnamed that lives between those worlds.
